caption: A bright, minimalist bedroom features two single beds with white linens and pink accents, a white dresser, and a large red floral area rug on a tiled floor. The room is lit by natural light coming through windows covered by sheer white curtains. A white dresser stands between the two beds, with several small blue and white bottles arranged on its top surface. The walls are a neutral off-white color, and the room is devoid of people. Across the sequence, the camera remains largely stationary, capturing a wide shot of the space. There is very little movement between the frames, with only slight shifts in perspective and light, maintaining a consistent view of the static interior layout. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
